name: vortos/vortos
description: The Vortos Clean Architecture Framework — project skeleton

post-create-project-cmd: @php -r "$e=chr(27); printf(PHP_EOL . $e . '[32m✔ Vortos downloaded successfully!' . $e . '[0m' . PHP_EOL . PHP_EOL . 'To configure your environment, run:' . PHP_EOL . PHP_EOL . '  ' . $e . '[1mcd %s' . $e . '[0m' . PHP_EOL . '  ' . $e . '[1mphp vortos setup' . $e . '[0m' . PHP_EOL . PHP_EOL, basename(getcwd()));"
